caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap is seated behind a table in a room featuring a white wall. On the table, there are several stacked boxes of trading cards and a white surface with a logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" and "Sports Cards & Collectibles HERMOSA BEACH". The man is positioned in a small inset window in the lower right corner of the screen, and he appears to be speaking while gesturing with his hands. The main view shows a top-down perspective of the table, where a white card or paper rests beside the stacked boxes. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains mostly static, with the man's movements in the inset window and slight shifts in the main camera angle as he interacts with the items on the table. The logo "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" is prominently displayed across the center of the frame.
